staticText: Home Loan Application File Checklist. This route is an administrative evidence-status organiser, not an eligibility checker or lender adviser. It tracks ten generic evidence groups as not started, gathering, ready, needs update, or not requested, with optional non-sensitive labels limited to 80 characters. It creates local TXT and print/PDF summaries without uploading documents, persisting choices, or sending inputs to AI. Never infer approval, pre-qualification, DSR, LTV, affordable price, repayment, credit quality, deposit adequacy, bank policy, timing, rates, schemes, or country requirements. Route financial capacity to mortgage-affordability, quote modelling to mortgage-calculator, purchase cash planning to first-home-buyer, written-offer comparison to loan-compare, and fees to property-transfer-cost.
